title: Restore-from-backup test (mandatory, one-time)
userStory: As an operator, I want a proven restore procedure so that the backups are not theoretical.
acceptanceCriteria: Spin up a fresh FalkorDB container locally
rclone copy the latest dump from R2 to local
Mount the dump into the container's /data/dump.rdb and start it
Verify graph contents match production: entity counts and 3+ sample queries return matching results
